metadata.name: Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
metadata.description: A NeoForge mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft.

c2me.reason: keeping virtually every chunk from unloading when the server is running for a whole minute or even longer
causes the world to save infinitely
